problem_text_cn: 1458 测量斯忒藩-玻尔兹曼常数。[可供仪器和用具] 加热器、铝质圆筒、铁-康铜热电偶、数字式毫伏表、游标卡尺、冰水混合物等。[要求] 测量斯忒藩-玻尔兹曼常数$\sigma$，有三种方法：(1) 同温测量法：$\sigma = \frac{P_t(T) - P_n(T)}{S(T^4 - T_0^4)}$；(2) 恒定能量测量法：$\sigma = \frac{(T_p - T_b)P}{S(T_b^4 - T_0^4)(T_p - T_0)}$；(3) 不同温度测量法：$\sigma = \frac{(T_2 - T_0)P_1 - (T_1 - T_0)P_2}{S[(T_1^4 - T_0^4)(T_2 - T_0) - (T_2^4 - T_0^4)(T_1 - T_0)]}$。实验测得$\sigma_{\text{ex}} \approx 5.4 \sim 6.1 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{W/m^2 \cdot K^4}$，与公认值$\sigma = 5.669 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{W/m^2 \cdot K^4}$比值约0.95～1.07。
problem_text_en: 1458 Measure the Stefan-Boltzmann constant. [Available instruments and tools] Heater, aluminum cylinder, iron-constantan thermocouple, digital millivoltmeter, vernier caliper, ice-water mixture, etc. [Requirements] Measure the Stefan-Boltzmann constant $\sigma$ with three methods: (1) Isothermal measurement method: $\sigma = \frac{P_t(T) - P_n(T)}{S(T^4 - T_0^4)}$; (2) Constant energy measurement method: $\sigma = \frac{(T_p - T_b)P}{S(T_b^4 - T_0^4)(T_p - T_0)}$; (3) Different temperature measurement method: $\sigma = \frac{(T_2 - T_0)P_1 - (T_1 - T_0)P_2}{S[(T_1^4 - T_0^4)(T_2 - T_0) - (T_2^4 - T_0^4)(T_1 - T_0)]}$. Experimental measurement gives $\sigma_{\text{ex}} \approx 5.4 \sim 6.1 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{W/m^2 \cdot K^4}$, with a ratio of about 0.95 to 1.07 compared to the accepted value $\sigma = 5.669 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{W/m^2 \cdot K^4}$.
img_cn: 图1458_1：斯忒藩-玻尔兹曼常数测量装置及数据
img_en: Fig. 1458_1: Stefan-Boltzmann constant measuring device and data
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】抛光铝圆筒为理想反射体（$e=0$），熏黑后为理想黑体（$e=1$）。同温法：相同温度下，熏黑圆筒能量损失$P_t(T)$与光滑圆筒非辐射损失$P_n(T)$之差为热辐射损失；恒定能量法：相同加热功率下，理想黑体与反射体平衡温度不同，求辐射功率；不同温度法：熏黑圆筒在两个温度下的能量损失，消去非辐射项求$\sigma$。实验测得$\sigma_{\text{ex}}$与公认值比值约0.95～1.07，误差来源：表面非理想反射/黑体、瓷基座热损失、导线电阻、非辐射损失近似。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Polished aluminum cylinder is an ideal reflector ($e=0$), and blackened is an ideal black body ($e=1$). Isothermal method: at the same temperature, the difference between energy loss of blackened cylinder $P_t(T)$ and non-radiation loss of smooth cylinder $P_n(T)$ is the thermal radiation loss; Constant energy method: at the same heating power, the equilibrium temperatures of ideal black body and reflector are different, find radiation power; Different temperature method: energy loss of blackened cylinder at two temperatures, eliminate non-radiation term to find $\sigma$. Experimental $\sigma_{\text{ex}}$ has a ratio of about 0.95 to 1.07 with the accepted value. Error sources: non-ideal reflector/black body surface, heat loss of ceramic base, wire resistance, non-radiation loss approximation.
problem_answer: 斯忒藩-玻尔兹曼常数实验值：$\boldsymbol{\approx 5.4 \sim 6.1 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{W/m^2 \cdot K^4}}$；与公认值比值：$\boldsymbol{0.95 \sim 1.07}$；测量关键：区分辐射与非辐射能量损失，消除系统误差。
